goal_text: Make every RSX playground page, API endpoint, and user flow work end-to-end with RSX processes actually running. No mocks. No placeholders. Every panel shows live data.
project_context: RSX Playground is a Python/FastAPI debug console (port 49171) that wraps RSX exchange Rust binaries (gateway, matching engine, risk, marketdata, mark). Key files: rsx-playground/server.py (all endpoints), rsx-playground/pages.py (HTML), rsx-playground/stress_client.py (load tester), rsx-playground/market_maker.py (maker bot), rsx-playground/tests/ (806 pytest + 223 Playwright). Trade SPA at rsx-webui/dist/ served at /trade/. DONE: all routes 200, 806 API tests green, 223 Playwright HTML-structure tests pass, no absolute hrefs, stress returns 502 when gateway down. NOT DONE: RSX Rust processes have never been started live. No order has been accepted. No WAL contains records. Market maker has never placed a quote. No stress report exists on disk. All Playwright tests were run without live processes and accept placeholder content. play_stress.spec.ts does not exist. See rsx-playground/COVERAGE.md for full gap analysis. WORKER BOUNDARY: each worker handles ONE task from PLAN.md tasks list. Do not attempt to deliver adjacent tasks. Read PLAN.md for the full picture but deliver only your assigned task. Report done only when your specific acceptance criteria is verified.
